agents.title: Agents
agents.emptyHint: No agents yet. Start one in cicy-code on your desktop.
agents.emptyTeamHint: Scan the QR code in the cicy-code web app to join.

login.title: Sign in to cicy-cloud
login.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a sign-in link. Open it on any device to finish.
login.sentHint:
Sign-in email sent to {{email}}.
Open the link on any device — this screen finishes automatically.
login.joining: Signed in — entering your default team…
login.invalidEmail: That doesn't look like an email address
login.expired: The sign-in link expired — send a new one
login.timeout: Timed out waiting — send a new one
login.signOutConfirmBody: Cloud teams will be removed from this device; QR-scanned teams stay.

teams.removeConfirmBody: "{{title}}" will be removed from this device. You can re-add it by scanning again.

chat.noTurnsBody:
This agent hasn't generated any history yet, or it's routing directly to anthropic.com.

Tap the terminal button in the top-right for the live terminal.
chat.queuedHeader: {{n}} queued · sends when the reply finishes

meeting.title: Live meeting
meeting.emptyHint:
Tap Start below and speak — text appears live.
The transcript streams in; send it to the agent when done.
meeting.foregroundHint: Keep this screen in the foreground and the screen on — backgrounding or locking pauses recognition.
meeting.assistantPrime: I'm in a live meeting and will keep sending you my speech as it happens. Act as a meeting assistant: quietly capture the key points, don't reply line by line — only summarize or answer when I explicitly ask.

attach.uploadFailed: {{count}} attachment(s) failed to upload — tap send to retry

scan.title: Add team
scan.subtitle: Scan the QR code from the cicy-code web app to add this device to a team.
scan.permissionBody: Scanning a QR code requires camera access. Enable it in system settings.
scan.stepOpenWeb: Open cicy-code in your browser on a computer
scan.stepShowQr: Click the QR code icon in the top-right corner
scan.stepAimHere: Aim the QR code at the frame above
